description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by a landscaped yard and enclosed by a low fence. The exterior features a mix of white and dark gray facades, with large windows and several balconies adorned with greenery. The front yard includes paved walkways, a small garden area, and mature trees providing shade and privacy. The rear section of the property has an open patio area and additional green space, ideal for outdoor activities. The house has multiple entry points, with the main entrance highlighted by a paved path and a small porch. The overall design blends contemporary architectural elements with functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, balconies, and landscaped yards enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled perspective, highlighting the backyard, patio area, and the arrangement of trees and garden spaces.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, showcasing the main entrance, paved walkway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side and rear of the house, emphasizing the flat roof sections, balconies, and the open green space in the backyard.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a top-down rear perspective, revealing the roof structure, terrace, and the overall layout of the property within the fenced boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a paved path, small porch, and a simple modern door with minimal overhang and landscaping accents.
